owner.name: Taylor Lance Morgan
owner.title: Founder
credentials: Founder of Signal Stance (2026) — career and visibility services for senior professionals and business owners
Founder of Raleigh Resume (2023) — credentialed career services firm, led by Dana Wang, CPRW
President and Founder of Morgan Heights Co., the operating parent for both firms
Years of practice in career services, personal brand, and content strategy
Built and operates the SignalStance Content Engine, the production infrastructure both firms use
owner.niche_summary: Career and visibility services for senior professionals and business owners — personal brand development, content strategy, LinkedIn strategy and ghostwriting, and career and positioning strategy. The work centers on the strategic thinking that has to happen before any writing begins: who someone is, what they offer, and how to present that clearly to the audiences that matter. Mid-market positioning between budget services and premium executive coaching firms, with editorial-quality output delivered through senior strategic input combined with AI-augmented production.
owner.audience: Director-level professionals and above at companies of 200–10,000 employees; solo consultants and fractional executives ($200K+) whose brand drives their pipeline; founders and small-business owners whose visibility matters for their work; established professionals (30s–50s) building long-term presence.
owner.audience_examples: Director of Engineering, VP of Product, Senior Director of Marketing, Fractional CFO, Founder of a B2B consultancy
specializations: Personal brand development for senior professionals and business owners
LinkedIn strategy and ghostwriting (ongoing presence management)
Content strategy — themes, cadence, and substance over time
Career and positioning strategy — resumes, LinkedIn profiles, broader career materials
Service design and direct founder involvement in every engagement
AI-augmented production with strategic judgment kept human
owner.client_outcomes: Substantial volume of clients across technology, finance, healthcare, and other technical and professional industries served through Raleigh Resume since 2023 — from mid-career professionals to senior executives and founders. Signal Stance Year 1 targets: 10–15 Foundation Projects, 3–6 Brand Builder retainers.

pattern.label: Pattern
pattern.placeholder: Share an anonymized observation from recent client engagements - what pattern emerges across many professionals?

faq.label: FAQ
faq.placeholder: Address a craft question about professional presentation that comes up repeatedly in your work.

noticed.label: Noticed
noticed.placeholder: Share an operator observation on AI and professional work, or subtle shifts in how the work is changing.

hottake.label: Hot Take
hottake.placeholder: Challenge conventional LinkedIn or career wisdom where the common advice is wrong or oversimplified.

default_ctas.beforeafter: Read the longer essay at signalstance.com/blog

Monday.suggestion: Share an anonymized observation from recent engagements. What's the pattern across many clients?

Tuesday.suggestion: Specific observation on resume, LinkedIn, or bio craft. Pick one mechanic.

Wednesday.suggestion: The thinking that has to happen before any writing. Positioning, identity, professional brand.

Thursday.suggestion: Operator observation on what AI is and isn't useful for. Never state we use it.

Friday.suggestion: Direct contrarian take on common LinkedIn or career wisdom that's actually wrong, oversimplified, or missing context. Skip if no idea is ready — better than filler.

categories.leadership: Executive leadership, senior management strategy, perspectives from Director-level and above.
categories.careers: Senior-level career strategy, transitions, and positioning. Excludes early-career and entry-level content.
categories.personal_brand: Personal branding theory and practice for serious professionals — substance over performance.
categories.linkedin: LinkedIn platform mechanics, algorithm changes, feature releases, behavioral shifts on the platform.
categories.ai_professional: AI in professional writing and knowledge work — operator-level analysis, not hype or panic.
categories.content_strategy: Editorial content strategy, longform and short-form mechanics, craft observations.
categories.hiring_senior: Recruiting practices specifically at Director-level and above. Distinct from entry-level hiring trends.
categories.fractional_market: The market for fractional executives, solo consultants, and independent professional services.
categories.compensation: Compensation data and trends for senior professionals, with an emphasis on fractional and consultant rates.
categories.workplace_research: Organizational research relevant to senior-career decision-making — not employee-engagement filler.

scoring.scoring_description: Score articles for relevance to {owner.name}'s niche: {owner.niche_summary}. Target audience: {owner.audience}.
scoring.scoring_high: Articles about personal branding, LinkedIn strategy, career positioning, and professional visibility for senior executives and business owners are directly relevant to {owner.name}'s expertise in {owner.niche_summary}.
scoring.scoring_low: Articles about entry-level career advice, general business topics unrelated to personal branding, or content focused on industries outside professional services are off-topic for this niche.
